workflow.trigger: sheep-ovary context plus a readable full-feature Seurat RDS
workflow.banksy_role: fixed whole-tissue clustering backbone for verified same-batch StereoPy cellbin_PPed inputs; optional adapter elsewhere
workflow.scanpy_role: fallback for AnnData-first inputs or an independent corroborating analysis
workflow.resolution_rule: adaptive; select the candidate with the best integrated evidence for the biological question, preserving stable lineages/subtypes before avoiding state/technical fragmentation; lower complexity is only a tie-breaker

cohort_reclustering_contract.rule: use the same normal candidate range for every sheep-ovary broad-class or targeted cohort; adapt the selected resolution, PCs and k within current-cohort evidence, never recluster final QC, and never lower resolution to compensate for a defective graph

whole_tissue_partition_contract.upstream_banksy_grid_policy: use every resolution actually present in the hash-bound BANKSY input; do not silently replace it with the query-reclustering grid
whole_tissue_partition_contract.required_review_window: selected plus the next two higher available resolutions; if fewer exist, review every higher candidate and record the upstream-grid limitation
whole_tissue_partition_contract.selection_endpoint: broad-lineage recall and cluster purity across the complete catalog, not cluster count or agreement with a prior annotation

trigger_all: R object inspection reports a Seurat object
Spatial assay is present with at least 10000 features
conversion manifest explicitly verifies a same-batch StereoPy cellbin_PPed conversion
counts/data layers, marker coverage and cell-coordinate identity audits pass

banksy.input: SCT scale.data Pearson residuals for 4000 SCT variable features

stereopy_cellbin_pped_contract.exception_policy: a numerical deviation requires an explicit batch-exception flag and a substantive recorded rationale; biological resolution selection remains adaptive

external_reference_policy.marker_spatial_evidence_role: mandatory audit and coherent-group challenge; not a duplicate per-observation prerequisite after query-anchor calibration

release_policy.maximum_default_depth: broad plus one independently supported functional subtype
release_policy.quality_reference_semantics: compare biological evidence quality with the validated deidentified R-first case; do not require matching labels or subtype depth
release_policy.oocyte_rule: send the complete multi-module starting candidate cohort to adaptive query-only reclustering; use strict marker/anti-program seeds and spatial foci to adjudicate clusters, never as a per-cell membership filter; after a cluster passes non-ZP/maternal, somatic-clearance and object-ensemble morphology review, release every canonical member except explicit hard-exclusion cells and return somatic neighbours directly to supported lineages with ambient tags
release_policy.vascular_release_rule: use Vascular-associated as the shared broad parent of blood endothelial, lymphatic endothelial and pericyte/mural cells; keep mature Smooth muscle separate
release_policy.large_residual_qc_rule: 10% or 50000 residual observations triggers upstream broad-recall re-audit before completion
release_policy.neural_candidate_rule: SOX10/S100B/PLP1/MPZ-like glial backbone or a coherent neuronal program plus track-like morphology; DLG2 or another single neuronal gene is insufficient. Candidate discovery is required even when the reference case lacked this class.
